description_long: This object is a small potted plant featuring a single, slender green stem emerging from a round, reddish-brown plastic flower pot filled with dark soil. The pot has a slightly flared rim and a subtle horizontal ridge around its upper third, giving it a classic nursery appearance. At the top of the stem, a pair of small, light green leaves are visible, with the beginnings of a flower bud or very young flower at the tip. The soil surface is uneven, with some small clumps and a natural, earthy texture. The pot itself is lightweight and appears to be made of thin plastic, typical for urban gardening or indoor plant use. This type of potted flower is commonly found on windowsills, balconies, or urban parks.
description: A small, young flower plant in a reddish-brown plastic pot with dark soil and a slender green stem topped by two light green leaves.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full round pot, central stem, and both leaves clearly visible above the soil.
description_view_1: Side view with the stem leaning slightly to the right, one leaf more prominent and the soil's uneven texture visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the stem upright and both leaves visible, highlighting the pot's circular shape and rim.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the stem leaning left, both leaves visible, and the pot's rim and base contours.
attribute_petal_arrangement: No distinct petals are visible; the plant appears to be in an early growth stage with only leaves present.
